description: Yuuya Sakaki is the main protagonist of Yu-Gi-Oh! Arc-V. He is a born-entertainer who attends the You Show Duel School to advance his duelling expertise and become an "Entertainment Duellist," a specific type of professional duellist similar to his father. ~!A fun-loving and energetic boy, Yuya is very theatrical and loves to entertain people, traits he seems to inherited from his father (adoptive actually), Yusho Sakaki. name: Dola
description: Dola is the captain of a gang of air pirates composed of her three sons and five other subordinates. She is interested in the treasures of the ancient floating city of Laputa, which puts her at odds with [Sheeta](https://anilist.co/character/8523/Sheeta) and [Pazu](https://anilist.co/character/8524/Pazu). name: Ferris Eris
description: Ferris, who comes from a famous clan of swordsmen designated to serve as guards to the King of Roland, is the heroine of the story. She carries a typically emotionless expression, is fanatic about dango (Japanese dumpling) and can do almost anything for the sake of dango. Ferris is incredibly skilled in the sword and assigned by Sion to guard Ryner on his quest to search for the "relics of heroes". name: Frill
description: Frill is an artificial human created by Acca and Ura-Acca. Frill is cheerful and clever by design, showing intelligence significantly higher than that of the average fourteen year old. She also has a sense of humour, and is often seen laughing as a result of practical jokes or general silliness. ~!Frill's true nature however, proves to be far more sinister. name: Hikoichi Yakou
description: Hikoichi is an older gentleman with grey hair, a well-kept mustache, with his most distinguishing feature being his eyebrows which curl at the outer sides. Like a gentleman, he uses honorifics and is polite to anyone. However, he shows his savage side to satisfy his curiosity or during battles. He has a twin brother called Yakou Jouich. _Drop the Handkerchief:_ ~!After winning the Collecting the Handkerchiefs game, Yakou is able to preside over the Surpassing the Leader match. He walks to the to

name: Jinzouningen 16-gou
description: Android #16 is a large android with red hair and a green armor. Unlike other androids, #16 is gentle by nature, which deemed him a failure in Dr. Gero's eyes. His only objective was to kill Goku. He was awakened by Androids 17 and 18, much to Gero's dismay. While he was much stronger than the two, he took orders.

name: Kaguya Ootsutsuki
description: __Race:__ Celestial Being Kaguya Ootsutsuki was the matriarch of an Ootsutsuki clan branch family and mother of Hagoromo and Hamura. Long before the founding of the hidden villages, during an era of endless war, Kaguya consumed the fruit of the God Tree and became the first wielder of chakra on Earth, before later merging with the tree to become the Ten-Tails.

name: Madara Mikejima
description: __Units:__ MaM, Double Face __Circles:__ Kaori, SHIN A man who can flexibly rush to people's aid no matter the task, be it festivals or a revitalization project. Cheerful and bold, he closes the distance between himself and others, no matter who they may be. With a gentle, light singing voice, his performances are daring, but mindful of others. name: Mayu Ooba
description: Ooba is an instructor at the prep school that Yatora attended. She is a highly eccentric, carefree, and wise teacher who cares deeply for her students and her craft. She tends to be blunt and loud, and often tells her students about random animal trivia, more so during stressful times.

name: Nana
description: Nana is a third-year female student. She dresses and acts similarly to the character of the same name in the manga "Nana".

name: Reno
description: Reno is a Turk fighter, comrade/partner of Rude, who uses an electric rod. Most often characterized as loud, reckless and laid-back, Reno is assigned to lead the Turks after Tseng was injured (at least in the movie), which then indirectly shows his seniority despite his "slacker" appearance.

name: Seiun Sky
description: As one of the most easygoing girls you'll meet, she lives life at her own pace. But on the inside, she's quite the schemer, and her laziness is just an act to get others to let down their guard... sometimes. Her hobbies include taking afternoon naps and fishing. She also loves cats and is often seen curling up with them outside on the grass. She's classmates with [Special Week](https://anilist.co/character/125299/Special-Week).
